item.title: Škrtidlo na vyslazování a scezování
item.description: Škrtidlo na vyslazování a scezování Místo kovového škrtidla jsem sáhl po 3D tisknutém řešení nalezeném na internetu. Model Hose Clamp / Škrtidlo na hadičku – Printables

item.title: Sklizeň chmele 2022
item.description: Sklizeň chmele 2022 V roce 2022 proběhla první sklizeň ze čtyř babek chmele vysazených v roce 2021. Výsledky sklizně Odrůda Počet babek Čerstvá hmotnost Suchá hmotnost ŽPČ (Žatecký poloraný červeňák) 2 997 g 360 g Sládek 2 – 458 g Sušení probíhalo na půdě, přirozeným prouděním vzduchu po dobu 5–7 dní.

item.title: Building hop garden
item.description: Building hop garden Here is documentation of the hop garden building process. I built it in May 2022. I planted 4 hop plants the previous autumn: 2× Žatecký poloranný červeňák (Saaz) and 2× Sládek.

item.title: Making scale on stainless pots
item.description: Making scale on stainless pots I first tried the method described at cech-pivo.cz. It worked, but the result was unsatisfying and it took too long.

item.title: Building brewhouse-cellar
item.description: Building brewhouse-cellar For homebrewing you need quite a lot of room – just try it in your kitchen and you’ll see.

item.title: My first brewing
item.description: My first brewing I chose the recipe ALE 11° Lemondrop from Pivotéka Tábor. In the future I want to brew lagers, but for a start something lighter seemed right.

item.title: Copper manifold
item.description: Copper manifold A copper manifold is used for lautering. It is an alternative to a traditional false bottom or a bazooka screen.

item.title: Making copper spiral tube
item.description: Making copper spiral tube For my DIY microbrewery I needed two copper coils: HERMS coil – for heating the mash by circulating it through hot water Wort chiller coil – for rapidly cooling the wort after boiling Copper was the obvious choice: it has roughly 20× better thermal conductivity than stainless steel, significantly reducing heat exchange time.

item.title: Introduction - motivation
item.description: Introduction – motivation April 2021 After finishing my powerwall project, I was looking for the next big project that will keep my brain and hands busy.

item.title: Peristaltic pump for microbrewery
item.description: Peristaltic pump for microbrewery For pumping wort and hot water I designed and printed a custom peristaltic pump suitable for food use.

item.title: About
item.description: About me I am ‘91 Software Developer that like programming, electronics, DIY, home brewing, space and astronomy. I am fan of FOSS (Free open source software).
